## Summary
Describe the purpose of this pull request.

## What changed
- List the main content changes here
- Include the files or sections that were updated

## Preview
- Mention how reviewers can preview the changes (Markdown preview, file paths, diagrams)

## Notes for reviewer
- Call out anything special or that needs careful review
- Mention if this is a content-only change or if any formatting/diagram review is required

## Checklist
- [ ] This change is limited to markdown, diagrams, or documentation
- [ ] I have previewed the Markdown/ Mermaid diagrams locally
- [ ] I am submitting this as a PR for review before merging
